chain.thought: Explanation: The athlete’s “previous best” of 5.65 m appears in 2006 at two events (World Indoor Championships and European Championships). Thus, if he was said to beat a previous best of 5.65 m, that “previous best” was actually set later in the same year—2006.

judge_thought: Explanation: The table shows the athlete cleared 5.65 m in two separate competitions in 2006: the World Indoor Championships in Moscow (row 7) and the European Championships in Gothenburg (row 8). Before 2006, his bests were lower (5.50 m in 2005). Thus, in 2006 he surpassed his prior best, but the “previous best of 5.65 m” referenced was itself established later that same year, creating the simultaneous condition described. Therefore, the year in which his previous best of 5.65 m was set later is 2006, aligning with the Prediction Answer.
